gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/164)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/164)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ الْجَدُّ يُقَاسِمُ الْإِخْوَةَ مَا بَلَغُوا وَ إِنْ كَانُوا مِائَةَ أَلْفٍ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Ismail Al Ju’fy who said,
‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The grandfather would be apportioned as the brothers, whatever (number) they reach, even if they are one hundred thousand’.
en.sarwar: 3. Al-Husayn from Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Hammad ibn ‘Uthman from ’Isma‘il al-Ju‘fiy who has narrated the following: “I once heard abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘The grandfather distributes the legacy with brothers, regardless of how many they are; even if they are one hundred thousand.’”
